CVE-2023-40826.title: An issue in pf4j pf4j v.3.9.0 and before allows a remote attacker ...
CVE-2023-40826.description: An issue in pf4j pf4j v.3.9.0 and before allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information and execute arbitrary code via the zippluginPath parameter.

CVE-2023-40827.description: An issue in pf4j pf4j v.3.9.0 and before allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information and execute arbitrary code via the loadpluginPath parameter.

CVE-2023-40828.title: An issue in pf4j pf4j v.3.9.0 and before allows a remote attacker ...
CVE-2023-40828.description: An issue in pf4j pf4j v.3.9.0 and before allows a remote attacker to obtain sensitive information and execute arbitrary code via the expandIfZip method in the extract function.

CVE-2025-70952.title: pf4j before 20c2f80 has a path traversal vulnerability in the ext ...
CVE-2025-70952.description: pf4j before 20c2f80 has a path traversal vulnerability in the extract() function of Unzip.java, where improper handling of zip entry names can allow directory traversal or Zip Slip attacks, due to a lack of proper path normalization and validation.
